commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The contributor must resolve the current-main conflict, after which maintainers need to decide whether the combined browse redesign is the intended product scope.; Cleared: The diff adds no dependency, workflow, permission, secret, downloaded-code, lifecycle-hook, or package-publishing changes, and no concrete security regression was found. (sha=b101cf463f80a55bb838e7ce7a69baa9cc5ab030)
commands.review_summary:
The branch shows totals only on unfiltered Skills, Plugins, and Publishers pages, adds maintained plugin totals to global stats and the plugins API, moves plugin catalog loading client-side, and reorganizes publisher, search, and navigation UI.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR introduces new browse-total and loading behavior rather than fixing an established failing contract, and its relevant before/after states are directly demonstrated.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The contributor must resolve the current-main conflict, after which maintainers need to decide whether the combined browse redesign is the intended product scope.

target.title: Show unfiltered browse totals
target.body: ## Summary - Show compact total counts on `/skills`, `/plugins`, and `/publishers` only when no browse filters or search are active. - Hide totals for filtered/search states and keep the old loaded-result copy removed. - Make the Plugins browse shell render immediately, then load catalog data client-side so Skills -> Plugins navigation responds quickly. - Maintain plugin totals through global stats and hide the plugin count until the first full reconciliation has populated it. ## A/B UI Proof Playwright compared `https://clawhub.ai` against this PR on localhost at `1440x900` in dark mode. Skills and Publishers localhost were pointed at the live Convex backend so the proof uses production-sized browse data. Plugins uses the local Convex backend because this PR adds the plugin total-count function that is not deployed on production Convex yet. | Page state | Production | This PR | Behavior | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | `/skills` | | | Production title count `70.4k`; this PR title count `70.4K` with live Convex data. | | `/skills?q=agent` | | | Production still shows title count `70.4k`; this PR hides the title count. | | `/plugins` | | | Production title count `100+`; this PR exact title count `251` from local Convex data. | | `/plugins?q=github` | | | Production changes the title count to filtered result count `9`; this PR hides the title count. | | `/publishers` | | | Both show unfiltered title count `499` with live Convex data. | | `/publishers?q=ope` | | | Production still shows title count `499`, `Showing all 19 publishers`, and `Clear`; this PR hides the title count and removes the extra copy/control. | The important behavior: unfiltered pages show a total, filtered/search pages hide the title count, and the misleading loaded/showing copy is gone. Raw proof files: - Gist with individual proof images: https://gist.github.com/jesse-merhi/f221735bed3d2d7f40c5ee4da0fdbc0d - Dark-mode local files: `/tmp/clawhub-ab-proof-dark/*.png`, `/tmp/clawhub-ab-proof-dark/metrics.json` ## Verification - `bunx convex codegen` - `bun run test src/__tests__/skills-index.test.tsx src/__tests__/packages-route.test.tsx src/__tests__/publishers-route.test.tsx src/lib/packageApi.test.ts convex/statsMaintenance.test.ts convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts convex/lib/packageSearchDigest.test.ts convex/packages.countPublicPlugins.test.ts` - `bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` - `bun run ci:static` - `bun run ci:unit` - `bun run ci:types-build` - `git diff --check` - Playwright dark-mode A/B proof regenerated for `/skills`, `/skills?q=agent`, `/plugins`, `/plugins?q=github`, `/publishers`, and `/publishers?q=ope`. - Autoreview: no actionable correctness issues reported; the helper footer still returned a false positive exit after clean review text. ## UI Checks - Skills and Publishers proof used `http://127.0.0.1:3004/` with `https://wry-manatee-359.convex.cloud`; `skills:countPublicSkills` returned `70338` earlier in this PR. - Plugins proof used `http://127.0.0.1:3002/` with local Convex data; `packages:countPublicPluginsInternal` returned `251`. - Verified filtered Skills, Plugins, and Publishers hide the title count. - Verified `/publishers?q=ope` returns live matches on the PR frontend when pointed at live Convex data. - Verified Skills -> Plugins shell rendered with the loading skeleton visible. - Checked responsive layouts at `390x844`, `768x1024`, and `1440x900`. - `npx --yes impeccable detect src/routes/skills/index.tsx src/routes/plugins/index.tsx src/routes/publishers/index.tsx --json` returned `[]`. - Playwright saw the existing local React hydration warning for theme attributes on `` when forcing dark mode before hydration; production did not log console errors in this pass.
target.author: jesse-merhi

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: knightplat-blip

target.title: fix: resolve QMD Windows shims and guard image URL downloads
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes the Windows QMD shim path and narrows the image URL work into a guarded provider-download path.

- Resolve Windows `.cmd` shims that point at quoted absolute JavaScript entrypoints.
- Use the real QMD package name, `@tobilu/qmd`, for package-bin fallback resolution.
- Parse OpenAI-compatible image responses that return `data[].url` instead of `data[].b64_json`.
- Route provider-returned image URLs through guarded HTTP with bounded reads, MIME validation, scoped same-origin transport reuse, configured media limits, and operation-deadline timeouts.
- Dropped the unrelated `node-llama-cpp` dependency/lockfile churn from the original PR scope.

## Behavior addressed

Windows QMD availability checks no longer fail when `qmd.cmd` wraps a quoted absolute Node entrypoint instead of a `%~dp0`-relative entrypoint. OpenAI-compatible URL-backed image generation responses now produce image assets without using raw fetch or broad private-network carryover.

## Real environment tested

- AWS Crabbox native Windows: `cbx_36917d25d801`, run `run_0dd48bf72083`, hydrate workflow `26722175678`.
- AWS Crabbox Windows WSL2: `cbx_92cdb109d982`, run `run_740f8e92e641`, hydrate workflow `26721781232`.
- AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate after rebase: `cbx_0b074a7498e9`, run `run_72f46782c53c`.

## Exact steps or command run after this patch

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugin-sdk/windows-spawn.test.ts packages/memory-host-sdk/src/host/qmd-process.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-manager.test.ts src/image-generation/image-assets.test.ts src/image-generation/openai-compatible-image-provider.test.ts extensions/openai/image-generation-provider.test.ts
node --max-old-space-size=8192 --import tsx scripts/generate-plugin-sdk-api-baseline.ts --check
node scripts/docs-list.js
node scripts/check-plugin-sdk-subpath-exports.mjs
git diff --check
node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --target linux --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"
```

Native Windows and WSL2 ran the same focused Vitest set on hydrated Crabbox workspaces. The final Linux changed gate was run after rebasing onto current `origin/main`.

## Evidence after fix

- Local post-rebase focused tests: 6 shards passed, 218 tests total.
- Native Windows Crabbox focused tests: 6 shards passed, 213 tests total on `run_0dd48bf72083`.
- WSL2 Crabbox focused tests: 6 shards passed, 215 tests total on `run_740f8e92e641`.
- Plugin SDK API baseline check passed after regenerating the baseline across the final rebase.
- SDK subpath export check passed.
- Autoreview passed clean after the URL-download security/timeout/boundary fixes.

## Observed result after fix

- Quoted absolute Windows `.cmd` QMD shims resolve to direct Node execution without shell fallback.
- Scoped QMD package fallback resolves through `@tobilu/qmd`.
- URL-backed OpenAI-compatible image responses are accepted and converted into generated image assets.
- Cross-origin provider-returned URLs do not inherit provider private-network/dispatcher/auth policy.
- Same-origin provider-returned URLs keep provider auth/transport policy and still use guarded fetch.
- URL downloads honor configured generated-media byte limits and share the image operation deadline instead of resetting timeout per download.

## What was not tested

Full live QMD memory indexing/search was not run. The final `pnpm check:changed` gate is blocked by a current `origin/main` type error in untouched `src/channels/message/ingress-queue.test.ts` from `b0679d1f13d`; this PR does not touch channel ingress queue files.
target.author: knightplat-blip

Windows QMD availability checks no longer fail when `qmd.cmd` wraps a quoted absolute Node entrypoint instead of a `%~dp0`-relative entrypoint. OpenAI-compatible URL-backed image generation responses now produce image assets without using raw fetch or broad private-network carryover.

## Real environment tested

- AWS Crabbox native Windows: `cbx_36917d25d801`, run `run_0dd48bf72083`, hydrate workflow `26722175678`.
- AWS Crabbox Windows WSL2: `cbx_92cdb109d982`, run `run_740f8e92e641`, hydrate workflow `26721781232`.
- AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate after rebase: `cbx_0b074a7498e9`, run `run_72f46782c53c`.

## Exact steps or command run after this patch

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugin-sdk/windows-spawn.test.ts packages/memory-host-sdk/src/host/qmd-process.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-manager.test.ts src/image-generation/image-assets.test.ts src/image-generation/openai-compatible-image-provider.test.ts extensions/openai/image-generation-provider.test.ts
node --max-old-space-size=8192 --import tsx scripts/generate-plugin-sdk-api-baseline.ts --check
node scripts/docs-list.js
node scripts/check-plugin-sdk-subpath-exports.mjs
git diff --check
node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --target linux --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"
```

Native Windows and WSL2 ran the same focused Vitest set on hydrated Crabbox workspaces. The final Linux changed gate was run after rebasing onto current `origin/main`.

## Evidence after fix

- Local post-rebase focused tests: 6 shards passed, 218 tests total.
- Native Windows Crabbox focused tests: 6 shards passed, 213 tests total on `run_0dd48bf72083`.
- WSL2 Crabbox focused tests: 6 shards passed, 215 tests total on `run_740f8e92e641`.
- Plugin SDK API baseline check passed after regenerating the baseline across the final rebase.
- SDK subpath export check passed.
- Autoreview passed clean after the URL-download security/timeout/boundary fixes.

## Observed result after fix

- Quoted absolute Windows `.cmd` QMD shims resolve to direct Node execution without shell fallback.
- Scoped QMD package fallback resolves through `@tobilu/qmd`.
- URL-backed OpenAI-compatible image responses are accepted and converted into generated image assets.
- Cross-origin provider-returned URLs do not inherit provider private-network/dispatcher/auth policy.
- Same-origin provider-returned URLs keep provider auth/transport policy and still use guarded fetch.
- URL downloads honor configured generated-media byte limits and share the image operation deadline instead of resetting timeout per download.

## What was not tested

Full live QMD memory indexing/search was not run. The final `pnpm check:changed` gate is blocked by a current `origin/main` type error in untouched `src/channels/message/ingress-queue.test.ts` from `b0679d1f13d`; this PR does not touch channel ingress queue files.
